articles.title: Boston police release new photos of alleged lemonade stand robber
articles.description:
Investigators are asking anyone who recognizes the juvenile to come forward.

The post Boston police release new photos of alleged lemonade stand robber appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston police released new photos of a juvenile suspected of robbing a lemonade stand.
Investigators urge residents to identify the suspect to aid in the investigation.
The incident raises concerns about safety for local children running small businesses.
